backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the School Mitra backend, defining data types (Student, Teacher, FeeRecord, AttendanceRecord, ReportCard, etc.) and CRUD operations with role-based access control and audit logging.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs (dashboard cleanup, modal background fixes, fee toggle, etc.) to their affected files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key implementation details of every component, hook, and utility in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, card, primary, etc.).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the School Mitra PWA, including viewport meta tags, PWA manifest link, favicon references, and the React app mount point.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA manifest for School Mitra specifying app name, icons (192x192 and 512x512), standalone display mode, theme color, and education/productivity categories.
frontend/public/offline.html: Styled offline fallback page shown by the service worker when the network is unavailable, featuring a retry button and dark-mode support.
frontend/public/service-worker.js: PWA service worker for the School Mitra app that caches static assets on install, cleans old caches on activate, and implements network-first (API/navigation) and cache-first (static assets) fetch strategies with an offline fallback page.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that handles authentication state via Internet Identity, manages actor initialization with a timeout/retry mechanism, and conditionally renders the login screen, profile setup modal, or the main dashboard with header and footer.
frontend/src/components/ActivityLogSecti: Displays a searchable, filterable audit log of all system actions, fetching entries via useGetAllActivityLogs and allowing filtering by role, action type, and free-text search.
frontend/src/components/AttendanceSectio: Provides a UI for marking and reviewing student attendance by class and date, using useGetAllStudents, useGetAllAttendance, and useMarkAttendance hooks with present/absent toggling and a summary view.
frontend/src/components/DashboardOvervie: Renders the main dashboard overview with a hero banner and a grid of stat cards (total students, fees collected, total teachers, outstanding fees) sourced from useGetDashboardMetrics, including loading skeletons and an error retry button.
frontend/src/components/FeesSection.tsx: React component for managing school fee records, supporting add/edit/delete/toggle-payment operations with search filtering and summary stats (total collected, outstanding, paid/unpaid counts).
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying the School Mitra brand, copyright year, and a 'Built with caffeine.ai' attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: App header displaying the School Mitra logo/brand, logged-in user profile info, and a logout button that clears the Internet Identity session and React Query cache.
frontend/src/components/LoginScreen.tsx: Login screen with two tabs—Admin (Internet Identity) and Teacher (uniqueId/password credentials)—handling authentication and error display for both flows.
frontend/src/components/OfflineIndicator: Fixed-position banner component that listens to browser online/offline events and displays a warning alert when the user loses network connectivity.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog shown to new admin users after login, prompting them to enter their name and save an admin profile via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/PWAInstallPrompt: Slide-in card prompt shown in the bottom-right corner that lets users install the School Mitra PWA, using the usePWAInstall hook to trigger or dismiss the install flow.
frontend/src/components/ReportCardsSecti: React component for managing student report cards with CRUD operations, supporting search/filter, grade display with color-coded badges, and a modal form for adding/editing report cards with subject marks.
React component for managing students with add, edit, and delete functionality, featuring a search filter, modal form dialog, and confirmation alert dialog for deletions.
React component for managing teacher profiles with add, edit, and delete operations, including a searchable list and modal form for teacher details like subject, assigned classes, and credentials.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing it with an authenticated or anonymous identity and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components via a React context provider.
frontend/src/hooks/usePWAInstall.ts: Custom hook that manages PWA installation prompts, handling the beforeinstallprompt event, install flow, and dismissal persistence in localStorage with a 7-day cooldown.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend data operations including user profiles, dashboard metrics, students, teachers, fees, attendance, and report cards using TanStack Query's useQuery and useMutation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter and Poppins fonts, sets up Tailwind CSS, and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes plus reusable component classes like stat cards and section headers.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Provides a Tailwind class merging utility (cn) and a formatINR function that formats numbers into Indian Rupee notation with lakhs/crores comma grouping.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with TanStack QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page component with tab-based navigation (Overview, Students, Teachers, Fees, Attendance, Reports, Activity) that conditionally shows admin-only tabs based on the user's role.
frontend/src/registerServiceWorker.ts: Registers a service worker for the app and logs update availability when a new worker is installed.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, font families, border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the school management dashboard project state including version, architectural notes, known issues, image requirements, and a list of existing features with their IDs and requirement references.
